name: Abyssal Designator
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>淵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>指</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>名</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Pay 1000 Life Points. Declare a Type and an Attribute. Your opponent must send 1 monster with both the declared Type and Attribute from their hand or Deck to the Graveyard.
eff: Pay 1000 Life Points. Declare a Type and an Attribute. Your opponent must send 1 monster with both the declared Type and Attribute from their hand or Deck to the Graveyard.

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
